dashboardia.title: DashboardIA LLM
dashboardia.description: Intelligent operational hub merging productivity with advanced AI. Features RAG-based resource management, contextual assistant for document analysis (PDF, Excel, video), and local C#/.NET agents for task automation.

invoiceapp.title: InvoiceApp
invoiceapp.description: Comprehensive billing and collection management system for contractors and freelancers with legally valid digital signature, detailed status tracking, and a quick onboarding setup assistant.

pcm.title: Compliance Platform (PCM)
pcm.description: Robust web system for managing commitments and regulatory compliance in government entities. Implements CQRS architecture with MediatR for maximum security and scalability.

solucionesintegrales.title: Soluciones Integrales JS
solucionesintegrales.description: High-performance corporate portal and industrial CMS. Built with Next.js 14, it offers full management of projects, services, and multimedia resources with Cloudflare R2 and Resend.

portfolio.title: Gargurevich Digital Portfolio
portfolio.description: My professional portfolio designed with a Noir Premium aesthetic. Uses Next.js 15, Turbopack for ultra-fast builds, full internationalization, and fluid animations with Framer Motion.

house.title: House SaaS
house.description: Multi-tenant SaaS for property and condominium management with 5 distinct roles (superadmin, admin, owner, tenant, maintenance), role-based responsive sidebars, and centralized REST API.

jafernandez.title: JA Fernandez Electric
jafernandez.description: Bilingual professional website (ES/EN) for a licensed electrician in Nassau and Suffolk County, Long Island NY. Anti-spam contact form with Zod and React Hook Form validation, FAQ section, testimonials, Framer Motion animations, and local SEO optimized for Long Island searches.
features: Local SEO for Long Island NY

lumic.title: Lumic App
lumic.description: Full-stack e-commerce monorepo with Next.js 15 / React 19 frontend and ASP.NET Core .NET 9 backend in layered architecture. JWT Bearer authentication and ready for Azure deployment.
